text: radiohead is just sad coldplay and i will die on this hill
if u dont cry during the perks of being a wallflower ur literally a robot
lebron could play tight end in the nfl and nobody wants to have that conversation
my therapist said read attached by amir levine and now i cant stop diagnosing everyone
the last 20 min of interstellar is the greatest cinema ever made. no i wont elaborate
ppl who talk during concerts should be sent to a separate island
i started the huberman lab podcast ironically and now i take cold showers at 5am
succession is just keeping up with the kardashians for ppl who went to liberal arts schools
my coworker looks exactly like a young steve buscemi and i cant unsee it
ok but why is nobody talking about how good the new fontaines dc album is
read the body keeps the score and suddenly every argument i ever had made sense
people who clap when the plane lands also clap at the end of movies. same energy
hot take but the godfather part 3 isnt even that bad yall r just dramatic
nba regular season is literally meaningless just start the playoffs in january
if u listen to joe rogan unironically in 2026 thats a red flag im sorry
the bear season 3 was mid and everyone is too scared to say it
my neighbor looks like if timothee chalamet gave up on his dreams
reading adult children of emotionally immature parents changed my whole personality
ppl who hold their phone up the entire concert deserve jail time honestly
beyonce's country album is better than 90% of actual country music fight me
i rank blink182 albums for fun and untitled is always #1 no discussion needed
started watching shogun thinking itd be boring and now i have a katana on my wall
the mets will always find a way to hurt me and i will always come back
my uber driver looked exactly like post malone pre-tattoos
can we talk about how call me by your name is basically just a peach commercial
the midnight library by matt haig is just therapy disguised as fiction and thats ok
hockey is the most underrated sport and basketball is the most overrated there i said it
i listen to maintenance phase while eating fast food and i feel seen
stop telling ppl to watch the wire as their first prestige tv show its homework
taylor swift has too many albums now and half of them are filler sorry not sorry
my barista is literally zendaya if zendaya was 5'2 and from ohio
ppl who sing every word at concerts louder than the artist are a menace
ok computer > kid a and im tired of pretending otherwise
read maybe you should talk to someone and immediately texted my ex an apology
the 76ers will never win anything meaningful in my lifetime and ive accepted it
ive been watching love is blind since season 1 and every season is worse but i cant stop
my dentist looks like if ryan gosling had a really bad year
ppl who say vinyl sounds better are just paying $30 for vibes and thats fine
started listening to the daily and now i have opinions about geopolitics at brunch
dune part two is a top 5 movie of the decade and its only 2026
arsenal will bottle it every single year until the heat death of the universe
whoever told me to read no bad parts by richard schwartz i owe u my life
the tall ppl who stand in front at concerts know exactly what theyre doing
kanye peaked at my beautiful dark twisted fantasy and everything since is cope
my prof looks like a walmart version of henry cavill and it makes class unbearable
slow horses is the best spy show on tv and nobody watches it which is criminal
tom brady could unretire again and id still watch every game im broken
reading set boundaries find peace literally rewired my brain about family dinners
the eras tour was a religious experience and i dont even like taylor that much
in rainbows is the best album of the 2000s and this is not debatable
my mailman is literally the rock if the rock was 5'7 and didnt lift
podcasts have replaced my entire personality and i am not ok about it
the padres are the most fun team in baseball and im not even a fan
if u havent read when things fall apart by pema chodron u r not healing properly
people who leave concerts early to beat traffic dont deserve to go to concerts
i watched all of severance in one sitting and now nothing feels real
lana del rey makes music for ppl who romanticize their own sadness. its me im ppl
my landlord looks like if jeff bezos had less money but the same energy
the smartless podcast is just three rich guys laughing at their own jokes
soccer will never be big in america and im tired of ppl pretending otherwise
gone girl should be required reading before anyone is allowed to date
the couple behind me at the movies wouldnt stop narrating the plot to each other
blonde by frank ocean is a masterpiece but i cant listen to it without crying
read codependent no more and realized i was the problem the whole time lmao
white lotus s2 was better than s1 and the music alone proves it
my gym trainer looks like chris hemsworth if chris hemsworth ate only gas station food
the nfl has too many games now and thursay night football is always trash
i got into crime junkie and now i lock my doors 4 times before bed
oppenheimer was 3 hours and i felt every single one of them
phoebe bridgers makes music for ppl who stare out of rain windows on purpose
read why does he do that by lundy bancroft and threw it across the room twice
ppl who wear the bands merch to the bands concert are valid actually
the knicks are back and i refuse to get my hopes up again but here i am
my boss looks like a deepfake of mark zuckerberg and it haunts me daily
i binged fallout in two days and now i want to play the game but i have no time
hard agree that abbey road > sgt peppers and im not interested in counterarguments
listening to the ezra klein show makes me feel smart for like 20 minutes max
figure skating is a sport and if u disagree u clearly never tried a triple axel
read untamed by glennon doyle on a plane and ugly cried next to a stranger
the person next to me at the concert elbowed me 47 times. yes i counted
chappell roan came out of nowhere and now shes the only thing i listen to
squid game s2 was unnecessary but i watched it opening day like a clown
my accountant is jake gyllenhaal with glasses and a worse jawline
f1 is just expensive go karts and the drama is the only reason anyone watches
conan o'brien needs a friend is the only podcast where i actually laugh out loud
everything everywhere all at once deserved every oscar and then some
mitski writes songs that make me feel like im being emotionally investigated
read the courage to be disliked and it made me way more annoying at parties
stop bringing toddlers to concerts that start at 10pm. this is not a suggestion
the lions are actually good now and my brain doesnt know how to process it
my dog walker looks like timothee chalamet and i schedule extra walks now
3 body problem on netflix was confusing but i pretended to understand all of it
rumours by fleetwood mac is the greatest breakup album and nothing comes close
i subscribed to 11 streaming services and still cant find anything to watch
womens basketball is genuinely more fun to watch than the nba right now
the alchemist by paulo coelho is not deep its a fortune cookie in book form
if u talk during the quiet part of a song at a concert i am judging u forever
saltburn was unhinged and i think about the bathtub scene weekly
my therapist recommended the power of now and i couldnt get past chapter 2
the office is comfort tv but if u quote it in 2026 im walking away from u
